creator: georg.lastname@web.de
text:
Created attachment 216533
xdisk.shar for version 1.33

I am reopening this. 
There was a major rework. It improved code quality, security, the interface, and added some features.

xdisk is a  partition editor for FreeBSD with a graphical user interface.

There is a FAQ on github:
github.com/random532/xdisk

I might add a video on twitter as well.
I lack the hardware to test RAID.

.shar file is included.
